predictions.capacity: The shared catalog stays below 4096 tokens, definitions stay below 160 tokens, visible references stay below 128, and every fallback, cap, projection, and overflow counter is zero.
predictions.diagnostic: Naive per-physical-object semantic expansion may exceed 4096 tokens late in a training game; shared catalog references, rather than clipping or a new representation, should explain the miss.
predictions.release: Live Command p95 stays below 100 ms, headless and replay exceed 500 semantic steps/s, live completion exceeds 1 game/s, and release RSS stays below 512 MiB.
predictions.training: The selected saturated teacher exceeds 4 root steps/s, 512 traversals/s, and 0.04 complete games/s with PUCT p95 below 2 seconds and RSS below 2 GiB.

contract.representation_decision: retain full_clone/current_game_v1 unless this workload supplies contrary decision-bearing evidence
contract.strongest_confound: Absolute latency and RSS are single-host evidence even though source, binary, workload, seeds, and worker topology are exact.
